and payment person or partnership who sells any mineral in Zambia, a mineral
of tax
royalty Lax at the rates prescrilx::d in the Schedule to this AcL.
(2) The tax shall be payable on the value in kwacha of the net
amount realised from the sale of any such mineral.
(3) The tax shall be levied at the end of each month during each
charge year and shall be based on the total amount received during
the month, less the allowable expenditures.
(4) The tax shall be due and payable within fourteen days
following the end or the month to which the tax relates:
Provided that the Commissioner-General may, for sufficient
cause shown, allow such longer period as he may detem1ine either
generally or in any particular case.
